data.title: Lithia Motors Q3: Earnings Beat Estimates, New Store Acquisitions Expand Market Reach Across Luxury Segments In Florida
data.description: Lithia Motors reported Q3 adjusted EPS of $8.21, exceeding estimates, while expanding its market presence in Florida through new acquisitions.

data.title: Tesla Stock Faces Selling Pressure Ahead Of Q3 Earnings: 4 Takeaways From The Chart
data.description: Tesla stock is currently down 12.26% YTD, but technical indicators suggest a bearish trend. Can buying pressure turn things around?

data.title: Mortgage Applications Fall For Fourth Straight Week As High Rates Squeeze Homebuyers
data.description: Mortgage rates surge, causing sharp drop in applications for 4th consecutive week. Refinance and new purchase applications down, as interest rates rise. Mortgage-related stocks also falling. Fed's next move awaited.

data.title: Trump Cosplayed As A McDonald's Worker And The Internet Can't Get Enough–'Just Like Most Of Trump's Businesses, This McDonald's Was Closed'
What's Going On With US Listed Chinese EV Stocks Nio, Li, XPeng Wednesday?
data.description: IMF downgrades China's growth forecast to 4.8% for 2024, citing weak consumer confidence and domestic property issues. Challenges remain for world's second-largest economy despite stimulus efforts.
